nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
MODES:
TXT2IMG — References are of no matter. You may disable or enable them; that won't have an effect on generation, but you will lose a bit of time for resizing and conditioning that will go nowhere.

IMG2IMG — Image 1 is the main image; references are of no matter. The only mode where you need to change the denoise value.

Edit — Image 1 is usually the main, but it depends on your prompt. Image 1 will get the resolution you set in Resolution master if you keep the same ratio. I tested all five images as references; they worked. The 6th reference didn't make an effect, just slowed down the generation. Each additional reference adds degradation and increases generation time.

"Adetailer" is most useful when working with generations of LORA (a person or a character).

Florence-2 caption uses image 1.

Controlnet" is not actually ControlNet; it's simply another reference for the edit mode. You can't control the power of influence, but it still works pretty well.

nodes.title: Bookmarks
widgets_values: Bookmarks were adjusted for my 2K 16:9 monitor. With any other resolution and aspect ratio, I am almost sure you will need to adjust them yourself if you want to use them.
